programme.title: The Conners

programme.desc: Jackie convinces Dan to build a chicken coop in the backyard, so the family can eat organic eggs; Becky meets with Andrea for the first time since the surrogacy mishap; Darlene deals with a sleazy customer at her casino job.

programme.title: The Conners
programme.desc: Dan questions Peter's motives when he learns about the pricey Christmas gift Jackie purchased for her new, unemployed beau; Mark and Mary write up their Christmas wish lists; Darlene receives advice from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim is pressured into standing up to Jill after he buys expensive sports tickets without consulting her.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy (Jonathan Taylor Thomas) won't admit his fears when Jill and Tim (Patricia Richardson, Tim Allen) convert the basement into his bedroom.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Bud makes Tim entertain a station manager during the Taylors' romantic getaway.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) isn't as thrilled as Tim (Tim Allen) when he learns he will be receiving an honorary doctorate degree.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Bob enlists Tunde's help to buy an engagement ring, but his plans to propose to Abishola are upended by her belief that a traditional marriage is more trouble than it's worth.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Abishola must reconcile a decade-old wound when she's forced to attend the funeral of an unlikable aunt; Bob struggles at the factory with the first batch of socks before receiving support from an unlikely source.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Dana and Cheryl worry when their respective partners Andy and Jim decide to take up some dangerous adrenaline sports.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim and Cheryl's botched anniversary moments from years past.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa take the girls to the family cabin, where Mike challenges them to unplug for the weekend and stay off their phones; for a school assignment, Jen shadows Kyle at work.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Chuck and Carol decide to renew their vows, Mike plans to take his officiating to the next level.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: After Mandy and Kyle combine their finances, they begin to quarrel.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Vanessa "helps" Mandy and Kyle look for their first apartment; Mike is thrilled when Ryan's good business decisions have him unknowingly embracing capitalism.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim tries to convince Cheryl that it was her idea to turn the basement into a media room instead of a room for Gracie and Ruby, blaming her forgetfulness on pregnancy.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim uses Andy's gift certificate just before Andy remembers he has it and invites Jim to help him use it.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim institutes a tribunal system to stop the children from bickering, and it works well for solving the children's problems but backfires when he and Andy have an argument.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: After years of dating, Andy meets the perfect girl and worries that she will break up with him; Jim offers to take Andy's girlfriend's daughter to a concert with Ruby and Gracie.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.sub-title: What You See Is What You Get
programme.desc: Tim's (Tim Allen) obvious enjoyment of some breast-enlargement literature leaves Jill (Patricia Richardson) feeling undesirable.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy, pretending to be thirty-two years old, meets a woman on a singles message board on the computer, and she comes by for a visit; Tim tries to help Mark with his science project.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim (Tim Allen) and Bob Vila face off in a handyman auction and also compete in an auto race. With Bob Vila as himself.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.sub-title: Back in the Saddle Shoes Again
programme.desc: When Jill is laid off from work, Tim is less than considerate.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Eve comes home for a visit and struggles to connect with her nieces; Kyle turns to Ed when he worries he isn't dynamic enough in his preaching.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Vanessa help Mandy and Kyle with their estate planning but are disappointed with whom they plan to appoint as Sarah's legal guardian; Jen begins working at Outdoor Man and takes advice from Chuck a tad too seriously.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: After her granddaughter starts misbehaving, Vanessa gives Mandy a valuable parenting lesson; Mike is challenged to find a meaningful gift for his business anniversary with Ed.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Kristin and Ryan go head-to-head in a business negotiation for Outdoor Man that puts their marriage in a sticky situation; Vanessa and Mandy compete to see who can log the most steps in a day.

programme.desc: Kelso (Ashton Kutcher) invites the gang out to dinner and then abandons them before the bill comes. With Topher Grace and Laura Prepon.

programme.desc: Eric (Topher Grace) pulls down Donna's (Laura Prepon) pants during a basketball game with the guys, revealing her granny panties.
